# INTRODUCTION {#sec-introduction}

{{< lipsum 2 >}} @fig-one

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-one
#| fig-cap: Concentration-Time Profile for Theophyline 

fig_path <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp", "deliv", "figures", "fig-conc-time.pdf")
knitr::include_graphics(fig_path)
```


{{< lipsum 3 >}} @tbl-summary



::: {#tbl-summary tbl-pos="htp"}
 
```{r}
#| echo: false 
#| output: asis
table_file <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "tables", "tbl-summary.tex")
cat("\\input{", table_file, "}")
```


{{< meta table_caption >}}
:::



{{< lipsum 2 >}} \Cref{tab:ConCov}

::: {.lscape}


```{r}
#| echo: false 
#| output: asis
table_file <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "tables", "tbl-summary-long.tex")
cat("\\input{", table_file, "}")
```

:::

{{< lipsum 1 >}}


{{< lipsum 1 >}}see @tbl-summary-2

::: {.lscape}

```{r}
#| label: tbl-summary-2
#| tbl-pos: "H"
#| tbl-cap: Descriptive Statistics of Studies Included 
#| echo: false 
#| output: asis

table_file <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "tables", "tbl-summary.tex")
cat("\\input{", table_file, "}")
```

:::

{{< lipsum 1 >}} \Cref{tab:sumstats}


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis 
table_file <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "tables", "tbl-summary.tex")
caption <- "Yet Another Descriptive Statistics"
label <- "tab:sumstats"

lines <- c(
  "\\begin{table}[H]",
  sprintf("\\caption{%s}", caption),
  sprintf("\\label{%s}", label),
  sprintf("\\input{%s}", table_file),
  "%additional LaTeX code", 
  "\\end{table}"
)
cat(paste(lines, collapse = "\n"), "\n")

```

{{< lipsum 3 >}} @fig-two

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-two
#| fig-cap: Concentration-Time Profile for Theophyline Panel A and B
#| fig-pos: "H"

fig_path <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "figures", "fig-conc-time-layout-2.pdf")
knitr::include_graphics(fig_path)
```

{{< lipsum 1 >}} see [@efron2000bootstrap]

::: {#fig-three fig-pos="H"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false


fig_path <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "figures", "fig-conc-time-layout-2.pdf")
knitr::include_graphics(fig_path)
```

\raggedright The solid lines represent something

Concentration-Time Profile for Theophyline Panel A and B
:::

# NONMEM OUTPUT

\begin{nonmemlisting}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| output: asis

lst_path <- here::here("wk11", "pmx-ecp","deliv", "106.lst")
brio <- readLines(lst_path)
cat(brio, sep = "\n")
```

\end{nonmemlisting}
